text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending a day out with Taiki Shuttle, I take
a breather in my office.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Let's go home together!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We're not done hangin' out till I'm back at my
dorm! There's still more fun to be had!
choice_data_list: Sorry, but I need to work after this.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh... I guess that comes first.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aww...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've got it! I'll just wait till you're done!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You go ahead and work as much as ya like!
choice_data_list: Are you sure? It might take until evening.
Are you sure? It might take until evening.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's no problem at all! I'll be real quiet, so as
not to disturb ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's completely dark outside by the time I wrap up
the last of my work.
choice_data_list: All done. Sorry to make you wait so long.
All done. Sorry to make you wait so long.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Mornin', Trainer! See, you could barely tell I was
here!
choice_data_list: Sorry there wasn't much for you to do.
Sorry there wasn't much for you to do.
You've got a bit of drool there.
You've got a bit of drool there.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Mornin', Trainer! See, you could barely tell I was
here!
choice_data_list: Sorry there wasn't much for you to do.
Sorry there wasn't much for you to do.
You've got a bit of drool there.
You've got a bit of drool there.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What're ya talkin' about? Watchin' ya work was
plenty fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Though I did take a moment to rest my eyeballs!
Hahaha!
choice_data_list: I'll walk you back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer! That ain't no way to speak to a
lady!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I tell ya what. Walk me back to my dorm, and
I'll let ya off. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe, all right! Thanks a ton, my dear trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This can be my reward for keepin' ya company.
Heck, I can wait all day if this kinda happiness is
at the end of the road. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna walk real slow, so let's chat it up like
there's no tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle chatters happily with me all the way
back, her face beaming with joy.
